title: Fix the Fibonacci — Stack Overflow
description: The following recursive Fibonacci overflows for large inputs. Rewrite it iteratively to handle n up to 10^6 and output F(n) mod 10^9+7.

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let md=1000000007 in if n=0 then print_string"0\n" else begin let a=ref 0 and b=ref 1 in for _=1 to n-1 do let c=(!a + !b) mod md in a:= !b;b:=c done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !b end
